In case this is your first time, if you see a new folder in your gallery titled Sketchbook (possibly with a number after) filled entirely with .TIFF files, those are the layer files saved locally on your device, rather than in the app data. More than likely, the images wont display in this format. Don't mess with them, as doing so will render your artwork unable to be opened or altered. when doing data transfers, these are the files you want to move to new devices, as they're the actual artwork.
